schema.title: Report Document
schema.description: Typed JSON document for LLM-authored reports. Generated from manifest.json for Go validators, JS dispatch metadata, and downstream type bindings.

presentationNotes.diagram_structure_only: `diagram` is structured JSON, not raw diagram DSL. Pick `kind: flow|sequence|quadrant|tree|state|er` and fill the typed fields; unsupported diagram grammars are intentionally unsupported until added as first-class schema.
presentationNotes.image_src_constraint: `image.src` must be `https://…` or `data:…` URI. Local paths (`file://`, `/var/...`, etc.) break the single-file deliverable promise — the rendered HTML must remain self-contained even after being moved or shared.
presentationNotes.markdown_in_text_fields: Inline markdown (bold, italic, links) is supported in: `paragraph.text`, `callout.text`, `quote.text`, `list` items, `table` cells, `definition.def`, `faq.a`. Block-level markdown (headings, lists) inside these fields is NOT supported — use the dedicated surface for those.
presentationNotes.additional_properties_rejected: Every section schema is `additionalProperties: false`. Adding fields not declared in `$defs/section.<type>` fails validation. Don't try to smuggle metadata via undeclared keys; if a field is missing, file a real schema change.
presentationNotes.section_if_visibility: Any section may include `if`: a boolean literal or `{"$bind":"cell"}`. When false, HTML hides the section; Markdown skips it. The bound cell must be declared in `cells`.
